description_long: This is a large stone obelisk monument set on a rectangular, multi-tiered base, surrounded by a paved area. The obelisk rises from a square plinth and is flanked by engraved plaques on all visible sides, listing names in a formal, serif typeface. At the front of the base, there is a detailed sculpted figure of a reclining person, possibly representing a fallen soldier, accompanied by a lantern and floral arrangements. The base is bordered by low stone walls and planters, with some areas showing moss or weathering. The entire structure is set within a square paved platform, demarcated by small stone posts and a curb. The monument exudes a solemn, commemorative atmosphere, typical of war memorials found in public squares or parks.
description: A large stone obelisk monument with engraved plaques, a sculpted reclining figure, and a multi-tiered base surrounded by paving and planters. The structure is weathered and bordered by low stone walls and posts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reclining figure, lantern, floral arrangements, and three engraved plaques on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the base, planters, and a single engraved plaque, with the reclining figure partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three engraved plaques and the full width of the base, with no sculpted figures visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the reclining figure from behind, a lantern, and a single engraved plaque.
attribute_inscription: Multiple engraved plaques on all sides of the base, featuring lists of names in a serif typeface, likely in English. The inscriptions are legible and appear to be memorial dedications.
attribute_ornamentation: A detailed sculpted reclining figure on the front base, a lantern, and floral arrangements. The obelisk itself is plain, but the base is ornamented with relief sculpture and planters.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular and multi-tiered, with a central platform supporting the obelisk and flanked by engraved plaques. It features a sculpted figure, planters, and is bordered by low stone walls and posts. The surface shows signs of weathering and moss.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is a simple, pointed pyramid with a smooth finish and no visible ornamentation.
attribute_surrounding_features: Surrounded by a square paved platform, low stone posts, a curb, planters with vegetation, a lantern, and floral arrangements. The area is demarcated from the surrounding pavement.
